snippet.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu sabes
Como tu sabes.

Energy is contagious you know
And it never fails no no
No one’s getting tired I know
Cuz you got that fire eio
Dream a little higher
Lets go lets go lets go
We’ve taken all that our hearts can hold
We can’t hold on to the past no more
From the dirt and the tears you make gold
You are more than flesh and bone

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe ( I believe)
Cus you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game

Feel it, got everything you needed
Now bring it like you mean it
Just like you mean it
Dale no olvides lo que vales
juega como tu sabes
como tu sabes
Pele, Maradona
Maldini
Romario
Cristiano
Ronaldo
El Pibe
Iniesta
Beckham y Kaka
Messi
Mbape
Salá
Brazil
Uruguay
Argentina
Colombia
US
England
Germany
France
España Italia Mexico Japan
Korea/England Netherlands/Senegal
Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

snippet.title: Dead by Daylight | Jason | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The mask is on. The machete is dripping. The massacre has begun.   
Dead by Daylight: Jason.  

06. 16. 26. 

Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits. Pick a side and step into a world of tension and terror with horror gaming's best asymmetrical multiplayer.      

PLAY DEAD BY DAYLIGHT: https://buythegame.deadbydaylight.com/   

Join the official forum:  https://forums.bhvr.com/dead-by-daylight/

 Like and follow us on our official Social Media Channels:     
- Facebook:  https://facebook.com/DeadByDaylight
- Twitter:  https://twitter.com/DeadbyDaylight
- Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/deadbydaylight/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@deadbydaylight 

#DbD

snippet.title: Hoobastank - The Reason (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Hoobastank - The Reason (Lyrics): 

⭐Follow Dead Radio Club:
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/davcev/?hl=en
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0xF5l1EUXHQUG8jryaJrfN?si=bee0d3552a124b39
🔴 Picture : https://lexica.art/ 

⭐Hoobastank:
https://www.instagram.com/hoobastank/?hl=en

Lyrics:

I'm not a perfect person
There's many things I wish I didn't do
But I continue learning
I never meant to do those things to you
And so I have to say before I go
That I just want you to know
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
I'm sorry that I hurt you
It's somethin' I must live with every day
And all the pain I put you through
I wish that I could take it all away
And be the one who catches all your tears
That's why I need you to hear
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
And the reason is you
I'm not a perfect person
I never meant to do those things to you
And so I have to say before I go
That I just want you to know
I've found a reason for me
To change who I used to be
A reason to start over new
And the reason is you
I've found a reason to show
A side of me you didn't know
A reason for all that I do
And the reason is you

Contact: deadradioclubmusic@gmail.com
_________________________________________________
Hoobastank - The Reason
Released 28/10/2023
From the album "The Reason"

#Hoobastank
#alternative

snippet.title: Vought Rising - First Look | Prime Video
snippet.description:
One nation, under gods. Go back to where supes began in your first look at Vought Rising, coming 2027 to Prime. 

» SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/PrimeVideoSubscribe
 
About Prime Video:
Want to watch it now? We’ve got it. This week’s newest movies, last night’s TV shows, classic favorites, and more are available to stream instantly, plus all your videos are stored in Your Video Library. Prime Video offers a variety of unique and captivating entertainment, including original series “The Boys,” “Invincible,” “Hazbin Hotel,” “The Summer I Turned Pretty,” and more.

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - the cure (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
"the cure" out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/thecure
Shop "the cure" on 7" vinyl and cassette featuring an exclusive bonus song called "never do" that's not on the album: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Presave 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out on June 12th: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo
Twitter: https://x.com/oliviarodrigo
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livbedumb
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCy3zgWom-5AGypGX_FVTKpg
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq

Lyrics:
All the pretty girls in the foreground of my mind
I thought I’d done enough, but they keep moving the line
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
All the nights I spend fighting bad thoughts in my room
Feeling so alone, might as well be on the moon
I thought I found the antidote with you
I thought I found the antidote with you
 
But my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Used to play a game in my head
When I’d date a guy
Tally up the girls that he fucked
‘Til I start to cry
I thought I found the antidote this time
I thought I found the antidote this time
 
But I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
 
And my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried hard to suck them out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
 
Ohh
‘Cause baby I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
I’m unraveled
 
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
Why can’t you come stitch me up?
Why can’t it ever be enough?
It’s not enough
 
Oh because my head is full of poison
And my heart is full of doubt
I got toxins in my bloodstream
You tried so hard to suck out
And it feels like medication
And it’s good for me I’m sure
But it don’t matter how your love feels anymore
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be the cure
It’ll never be

#OliviaRodrigo #thecure #youseemprettysadforagirlsoinlove

Music video by Olivia Rodrigo performing the cure.© 2026 Olivia Rodrigo, under exclusive license to Geffen Records

snippet.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Third Round
snippet.description: The third round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson gets underway at TPC Craig Ranch. The remaining contenders navigate Moving Day to make assertive leaderboard climbs and secure spots within the final Sunday groupings in McKinney, Texas.

localized.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Third Round
localized.description: The third round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson gets underway at TPC Craig Ranch. The remaining contenders navigate Moving Day to make assertive leaderboard climbs and secure spots within the final Sunday groupings in McKinney, Texas.

snippet.title: Hurricane Wisdom & Chance the Rapper - Barbie Doll (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Stream "Barbie Doll"!
https://rebelmusic-gamma.lnk.to/BarbieDoll

Follow me on:
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/hurricane.wisdom
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hurricanewisdom850
Soundcloud: https://soundcloud.com/2020hurricane

Credits:
Production Company - @whyblinkfocus 
Director -@Wbfcotto 
Executive Producer - @wbfjersey 

Lyrics:
Okay

Okay

God, this lil' bitch bad, know she a bag, know she a Barbie doll
Swerve I move too fast, we just might crash, you know I ain't driving slow
She ain't got nothin' but ass, nothin' but class, just know I ain't leaving it alone
I got nothin' but cash in a roll
If you got a twin, I'm grabbin' you both 

Where them key’s I’m grabbing them both 
Say please I’m giving you more 
Baby don’t tease you know that we grown 
Keep shit quiet you know what you know 
And I got time I’m doing the most
Don’t got time I just pour a four 
You need me you know where to go 
Keep shit quiet you know what you know 

Pretty girl styling the gold
Her tooth-gem, smile and it glow
Thrifted dress but it’s skin tight
Damn near can see her soul
She wanna have a big night
Espresso martini Soho
She finna do her big one
Her ex grab his chest said “Oh no”

Grabbin her kissin her neck
Picking her up he sending her texts
He calling her phone tryin gettin her back
I’m telling her friends, “Go climb in the back”
We riding around 
He circling back
We painting the town 
He lurking on apps
She in the front seat doing karaoke 
while her two best friends wanna twerk in the back

Fourth one left and the third took a nap
second one sitting in the first one lap
Said, “Take us home, take care of our girl”
And the rest was a verse and the verse was a wrap,
Keep my word keep the dirt under wraps
Happy ending it was perfect at that
Keep my number in case of emergencies 
Cause if you prefer it we could sure run it back

God, this lil' bitch bad, know she a bag, know she a Barbie doll
Swerve I move too fast, we just might crash, you know I ain't driving slow
She ain't got nothin' but ass, nothin' but class, just know I ain't leaving it alone
I got nothin' but cash in a roll
If you got a twin, I'm grabbin' you both

Okay 

Pretty girls freezing in Chrome Heart, gave her the nickname cold 
Read a book on the murder she wrote, what’s the chance of me taking you home 
Say Chance, I’m calling an ISO 
Are you hearing me clear is the mic on 
You look good we can do it with the lights on 
We’ll both be home when the night gone 

Yeah 

You too fine to be stuck on the phone 
Ima fuck the first night 'cause I'm grown
Baby who the fuck say I was all bad 
Even then you said that they wrong
I can look and  just tell that you all bad 
I can tell that you all bad

Oh Oh

God, this lil' bitch bad, know she a bag, know she a Barbie doll
Swerve I move too fast, we just might crash, you know I ain't driving slow
She ain't got nothin' but ass, nothin' but class, just know I ain't leaving it alone
I got nothin' but cash in a roll
If you got a twin, I'm grabbin' you both

Where the key’s i’m grabbing them both 
Say please i’m giving you more 
Baby don’t tease you know that we grown 
Keep shit quiet you know what you know 
I got time i’m doing the most
Don’t got time I just pour a four 
You need me you know where to go 
Keep shit quiet you know what you know
